# discord_role (Data Source)

Fetches a single Discord role by ID or name. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_role" "admin" {
  guild_id = var.guild_id
  name     = "admin"
}

output "admin_role_id" {
  value = data.discord_role.admin.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `guild_id` (String) Guild to search within.

### Optional

- `id` (String) Role ID (snowflake). If unset, the role is looked up by `name`.
- `name` (String) Role name. If unset, the role is looked up by `id`.

### Read-Only

- `color` (Number) Role color as a decimal RGB integer.
- `hoist` (Boolean) Whether the role is displayed separately in the member list.
- `mentionable` (Boolean) Whether the role is mentionable.
- `permissions` (String) Permission bitfield as a decimal string.
- `position` (Number) Position in the role hierarchy.
